tool_args.label: Joint LIRR/Metro-North Committee Minutes, October 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Monday, October 24, 2022

payload.title: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Monday, October 24, 2022

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road (LIRR)
tool_args.raw_text: Representing Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Representing Metro-North

tool_args.label: MTA Police Department (MTAPD)
tool_args.raw_text: MTAPD REPORT

tool_args.label: Catherine Rinaldi
tool_args.raw_text: Catherine Rinaldi – Interim President [LIRR]; Catherine Rinaldi – President [Metro-North]; LIRR Interim President/Metro-North President Catherine Rinaldi

tool_args.label: MTA Construction & Development (C&D)
tool_args.raw_text: Construction & Development ("C&D")

tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line Third Track
tool_args.raw_text: The third and final section of LIRR's Main Line Third Track between Carle Place and Hicksville opened on Monday, October 3, with Governor Hochul presiding at a ribbon-cutting ceremony in Westbury. This project opened on time and $100 million under budget, unlocking huge benefits for LIRR customers and operations, especially when taken together with the opening of Grand Central Madison service before the end of this year.

payload.description: Third and final section of LIRR's Main Line Third Track between Carle Place and Hicksville opened on October 3, 2022. Project opened on time and $100 million under budget.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison (GCM)
tool_args.raw_text: With GCM service coming into clearer view, crews are performing safety and security drills. Last week, LIRR completed its second day of advanced pre-revenue testing, operating eight trains simultaneously

payload.description: New LIRR service to Grand Central Terminal expected before the end of 2022. Pre-revenue testing underway with live emergency drills planned.

tool_args.label: East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: he said that his branch will be affected by East Side Access. During peak periods and on weekends, he will not have a one seat ride between Atlantic Terminal and Hempstead or Far Rockaway.

payload.description: Project affecting LIRR service including Atlantic Terminal to Hempstead/Far Rockaway one-seat ride changes

tool_args.label: Metro-North ridership record October 11, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North again set a record on Tuesday, September 20 and yet again on Tuesday, October 11, with 192,900 riders or 74% of pre-pandemic levels.

tool_args.label: LIRR ridership record September 21, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR similarly has set a bunch of records since Labor Day, on September 7 and then again on September 21, with 204,600 riders, which is 71% of pre-pandemic levels.

payload.raw_value_text: 204,600 riders, which is 71% of pre-pandemic levels

tool_args.label: LIRR September on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR's September on-time performance ("OTP") was 96.3% and YTD OTP as of September was 96%, both of which are above goal of 94%.

tool_args.label: LIRR YTD on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: YTD OTP as of September was 96%

tool_args.label: LIRR August mean distance between failure
tool_args.raw_text: the August mean distance between failure ("MDBF") was 190,896 miles and YTD as of August was 217,439 miles, both of which are above goal of 190,000 miles.

tool_args.label: LIRR YTD mean distance between failure
tool_args.raw_text: YTD as of August was 217,439 miles

tool_args.label: LIRR September trips completed
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR completed 99.7% of its trips for the month and YTD.

tool_args.label: Metro-North September on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's September OTP was 97%, which was above goal of 94%.

tool_args.label: Metro-North YTD on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: YTD was also above goal at 97.1%.

tool_args.label: Metro-North August mean distance between failure
tool_args.raw_text: The August MDBF was 172,500.

tool_args.label: Metro-North YTD mean distance between failure
tool_args.raw_text: YTD MDBF was above goal at 210,000 miles.

tool_args.label: LIRR FRA reportable customer injury rate
tool_args.raw_text: For the 12 month period ending August 2022, the FRA reportable customer injury rate decreased from 3.92 to 2.42 per million customers

payload.raw_value_text: decreased from 3.92 to 2.42 per million customers

tool_args.label: LIRR FRA reportable employee lost time injury rate
tool_args.raw_text: the average reportable employee lost time injury rate increased from 3.97 to 4.13 injuries per 200,000 hours worked.

payload.raw_value_text: increased from 3.97 to 4.13 injuries per 200,000 hours worked

tool_args.label: Metro-North FRA reportable customer injury rate
tool_args.raw_text: For the 12 month period ending August 2022, the FRA reportable customer injury rate was 2.14 per one million customers, which was up from 2.11 for the prior 12 month reporting period ending August 2021.

payload.raw_value_text: 2.14 per one million customers, up from 2.11

tool_args.label: Metro-North FRA reportable employee lost time injury rate
tool_args.raw_text: The FRA reportable lost time employee injury rate was 2.14 per 200,000 work hours for the current reporting period, up from 1.90 for the prior period.

tool_args.label: MTAPD September 2022 felony count
tool_args.raw_text: for September 2022, they had 16 felonies for the entire system. More than half were grand larcenies. They had four felony assaults, with one against an MTA employee.

tool_args.label: LIRR service increase with GCM opening
tool_args.raw_text: These new express trains are part of the overall 41% service increase that will take effect along with the opening of GCM.

payload.context: along with the opening of GCM

tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line Third Track section opening/ribbon-cutting
tool_args.raw_text: The third and final section of LIRR's Main Line Third Track between Carle Place and Hicksville opened on Monday, October 3, with Governor Hochul presiding at a ribbon-cutting ceremony in Westbury.

payload.description: Third and final section of LIRR's Main Line Third Track between Carle Place and Hicksville opened with a ribbon-cutting ceremony in Westbury presided by Governor Hochul

tool_args.label: GCM advanced pre-revenue testing
tool_args.raw_text: Last week, LIRR completed its second day of advanced pre-revenue testing, operating eight trains simultaneously to test out the infrastructure, validate service planning assumptions, and gain experience dispatching the territory.

payload.description: LIRR completed its second day of advanced pre-revenue testing for Grand Central Madison service, operating eight trains simultaneously to test infrastructure, validate service planning assumptions, and gain experience dispatching the territory

tool_args.label: National Rail Safety Week 2022
tool_args.raw_text: both railroads participated in a series of events surrounding National Rail Safety Week, September 19 through 23, in order to raise awareness of rail safety and help the public learn how to keep themselves safe around stations, grade crossings, and rights of way.

payload.description: Both railroads participated in National Rail Safety Week to raise awareness of rail safety around stations, grade crossings, and rights of way. Part of both railroads' TRACKS programs.

tool_args.label: LIRR Connect With Us Forum at Merrick
tool_args.raw_text: President Rinaldi attended an LIRR Connect With Us Forum at the Merrick LIRR station on Wednesday, September 28.

payload.description: President Rinaldi attended an LIRR Connect With Us Forum at the Merrick LIRR station. Representatives from LIRR and MTA answered questions on GCM service, TrainTime app, Third Track completion, and Elmont-UBS Arena service.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Leaf Peeper seasonal weekend trains
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North began operating its popular Leaf Peeper seasonal weekend trains on the Hudson Line to take New York City area riders out to the incomparable scenery of the Hudson Valley. Weather permitting, there are five extra trains on Saturdays and four extra trains on Sundays which complement normal hourly service.

payload.description: Metro-North began operating its popular Leaf Peeper seasonal weekend trains on the Hudson Line. Five extra trains on Saturdays and four on Sundays complementing normal hourly service.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Hudson Line weekend service restoration
tool_args.raw_text: earlier this month Metro-North restored several half-hourly weekend Hudson Line trains, six on Saturdays and four on Sundays. These trains had been suspended with the July 10 schedule change to support three essential state-of-good-repair infrastructure projects between Cortlandt and Cold Spring.

payload.description: Metro-North restored several half-hourly weekend Hudson Line trains (6 on Saturdays, 4 on Sundays) that had been suspended with the July 10 schedule change to support infrastructure projects between Cortlandt and Cold Spring.

tool_args.label: GCM tunnel evacuation drill
tool_args.raw_text: Live emergency drills are planned for three weeks in October and November. In fact, there was a tunnel evacuation drill that went off without a hitch on Sunday. It was a great team effort, with participation not only from LIRR but also from Metro-North, Construction & Development ("C&D"), MTAPD, FDNY, and NYPD.

payload.description: Tunnel evacuation drill for Grand Central Madison performed on a Sunday, with participation from LIRR, Metro-North, C&D, MTAPD, FDNY, and NYPD.

tool_args.label: Metro-North laser train
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's adoption of laser train technology for the first time this year. This is a technology that was pioneered by LIRR in 2018, and is poised to become an important part of Metro-North's efforts to combat leaf season slip slide and flat wheels. The laser train works by using high intensity lasers to remove the debris, requiring only one pass to leave a smooth, clean rail behind.

payload.description: Metro-North's adoption of laser train technology, pioneered by LIRR in 2018, to combat leaf season slip slide and flat wheels. Uses high intensity lasers to remove debris from tracks in one pass.

tool_args.label: High pressure rail washer trains
tool_args.raw_text: Additionally, both LIRR and Metro-North operate high pressure rail washer trains to combat slip slide conditions. These water trains essentially complement the laser train.

payload.description: Both LIRR and Metro-North operate high pressure rail washer trains to combat slip slide conditions. These water trains complement the laser train.

tool_args.label: Main Line Third Track $100M under budget
tool_args.raw_text: This project opened on time and $100 million under budget

payload.claim_text: LIRR Main Line Third Track project opened on time and $100 million under budget

payload.subject: Main Line Third Track and Grand Central Madison

tool_args.label: Metro-North piloting laser train at higher speeds
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North is going to build upon LIRR's laser train innovation by piloting it at higher speeds.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is going to build upon LIRR's laser train innovation by piloting it at higher speeds
payload.subject: Metro-North laser train

tool_args.label: Hudson Line infrastructure projects
tool_args.raw_text: to support three essential state-of-good-repair infrastructure projects between Cortlandt and Cold Spring.

payload.claim_text: Three essential state-of-good-repair infrastructure projects between Cortlandt and Cold Spring on the Hudson Line supported the July 10 schedule change
payload.subject: Hudson Line infrastructure projects

tool_args.raw_text: The members of the Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") Committee met jointly with the members of the Metro-North Committee.
